function.name: gcd
function.description: Calculate the Greatest Common Divisor of two numbers.
function.long_description: Computes the greatest common divisor (GCD) of two integers, the largest number that divides both.
example_user_queries: Calculate the greatest common divisor of 270 and 192.
What is the GCD for a = 81 and b = 153?
Give me the highest common factor of 120 and 45.
Find the greatest common divisor between 144 and 360.
Calculate gcd using a 84 and b 126.
What is the common divisor result for 35 and 49?
Work out the gcd of 1001 and 77.
